query:
I need to confirm the exact state of the codebase for implementing OAuth JWT validation in snodo serve --tunnel. Find and return:

1. The exact content of snodo/infrastructure/tokens.py — I need to see the TokenIssuer class, especially the secret/algorithm handling and verify_token method
2. The exact content of snodo/mcp/transport.py — especially build_fastmcp_server() to see how FastMCP is constructed
3. The exact content of snodo/cli/commands/serve_cmd.py — especially _run_tunnel(), _run_server(), and _print_first_run_info()
4. Check if snodo/infrastructure/jwks.py already exists
5. Check if snodo/infrastructure/oauth_verifier.py already exists
6. List all files in snodo/infrastructure/ directory
7. Check pyproject.toml for existing dependencies (especially httpx, pyjwt, cryptography)
8. Check what version of the mcp package is installed (look at .venv or uv.lock)
9. Look at the tests/mcp/test_server.py file around lines 1014-1200 for the tunnel test patterns
10. Check snodo/mcp/__init__.py to see if it exports anything

Return the content of each file found.
